name: West African Groundnut Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons peanut butter (I use almond butter because I'm allergic to peanut butter)
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam or boil sweet potato cubes until tender.
2. In a large pan, sauté garlic, ginger, and spices for 1 minute.
3. Add onions and cook until soft.
4. Add tomatoes, eggplant, and stock/water; simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Add zucchini and bell peppers, then continue to simmer until all vegetables are tender (about 20 minutes).
6. Add sweet potatoes, tomato juice, and peanut butter (or almond butter). Stir well.
7. Simmer on very low heat for 5-10 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
8. Serve over rice, couscous, or millet.
